name: Garbanzo and Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the drained garbanzos, cooked brown rice, diced green peppers, finely chopped red onion, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the coarsely diced tomatoes to the mixture.
3. Pour in the wine vinegar and dillweed, stirring well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap or transfer the salad to a sealed container.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, tossing several times during the refrigeration period to allow flavors to meld.
7. Just before serving, give the salad one final toss to distribute any settled ingredients evenly.
